appliedUpdates.description: Added aria-label to back arrow button, added aria-label/associated labels to all 4 filter selects (module, status, sort, page size), added aria-label to pagination buttons, added aria-label to reset filter button, added aria-label to retry button, added aria-label to all action buttons (approve, reject, history), added aria-live polite region, and added role=alert/status to error/success banners.
Updated VAL-DASH-019 status from failed to passed after accessibility fixes
